title: Environment variables and secrets
excerpt: title: Environment variables and secrets description: Configuring environment variables and secrets for local development image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Do not use `vars` to store sensitive information in your Worker's Wrangler configuration file. Use secrets instead.
